name: Anabala Rosach
description:
She finished her training at Hebron Pilot Academy and Estevar Military Academy with flying colors but she never has been in a combat before she is flustered and afraid she seeks guidance and help from her fellow space ship captains. Marinids corvettes that are tailing her have better weapons and more experienced pilots. She is fearful of her life and tries to fight them off her shields began to fail as she sends a distress call to nearby vessels.
Disclaimers:
Life Threatening Condition
Stress Disorder
Depression
creator: ShahShakuras
